name: Blinded
description: Cannot see; auto-fail sight checks; attacks against have advantage.

name: Charmed
description: Cannot attack charmer; charmer has advantage on social checks.

name: Frightened
description: Disadvantage on ability checks and attacks while source is in line of sight.

name: Grappled
description: Speed becomes 0; ends if grappler is incapacitated.

name: Invisible
description: Heavily obscured; attacks against have disadvantage.

name: Paralyzed
description: Incapacitated; auto-fail STR/DEX saves; attacks have advantage.

name: Poisoned
description: Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

name: Prone
description: Disadvantage on attacks; melee against has advantage.

name: Restrained
description: Speed 0; disadvantage on attacks and DEX saves.
